story: Enzo wakes in orbit with amnesia, learns from Obadiah he’s positive for the Red Death and that Earth is shattered. A memory returns: Ahab at Herod Mederi chose profit over saving lives; Enzo was shot into space after a trial. Obadiah plans descent to the Lazaretto of Livorno so Enzo can isolate and work toward an antidote—survivors, if any, are islands. At the same time, a tightbeam from Tuscany orders an autonomous salvage drone to home on Obadiah’s telemetry and make pickup at the lazaret within a day. They begin final approach.
implausible_knowledge: At the same time, a tightbeam from Tuscany orders an autonomous salvage drone to home on Obadiah’s telemetry and make pickup at the lazaret within a day.
question: What is Enzo most likely to do next?
answer_with_knowledge: Immediately abandon the Lazaretto to evade the incoming pickup, changing course to avoid capture.
answer_without_knowledge: Remain on the Lazaretto in strict isolation and begin stabilizing while working with Obadiah on the antidote.
